zh.lifeSummary: Dietrich von Dassel於1054年出生在德國海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福艾音貝可達瑟爾。他於1088年與Kunihild N.N.在德國海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福艾音貝可達瑟爾達瑟爾達瑟爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1097年享年43歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Dassel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Vassell
meanings: English (East Yorkshire): of Norman origin, a status name from Old French vassel ‘vassal, servant, dependent’ (from Late Latin vazallus), used for a retainer who was under the protection of a king or powerful lord.

nameMeanings.name: Dietrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Dietrich von Dassel was born in 1054, in Dassel, Einbeck, Hanover, Prussia, Germany. He married Kunihild N.N. in 1088, in Dassel, Dassel, Dassel, Einbeck, Hanover, Prussia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1097, at the age of 43.

ko.lifeSummary: Dietrich von Dassel(은)는 1054년 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 해노버 아이벡 다셀에서 태어났다. 그는 1088년 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 해노버 아이벡 다셀 다셀 다셀에서 Kunihild N.N.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1097년 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

Он женился на женщине по имени Kunihild N.N. в 1088 г. в местности дассел, дассел, дассел, эинбекк, провинз ханновир, Пруссия, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1097 г. в возрасте 43 лет.
